user.title: Set up SpotifyDJ
user.description: Choose whether the SpotifyDJ device is already on WiFi, or provision WiFi credentials over Bluetooth first.

data_description.setup_method: Use Bluetooth only to write WiFi credentials. Pairing, Spotify and MQTT provisioning still happen over WiFi.

pair.title: Pair SpotifyDJ device
pair.description: Enter the pairing code shown on the SpotifyDJ device display. The manual device URL is only needed when mDNS discovery is unavailable. Spotify is a trademark of Spotify AB. SpotifyDJ is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Spotify AB.

data_description.pair_code: The 6 digit code or 12 character device suffix shown on the device display.
data_description.device_name: Friendly name for this SpotifyDJ remote.
data_description.device_language: Language for the SpotifyDJ device UI. This is sent to the device during pairing.
data_description.local_url: Advanced fallback. Use a real device hostname such as http://spotifydj-[device-suffix].local; 6 digit setup codes are not device hostnames.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.

ble_wifi.title: Provision WiFi over Bluetooth
ble_wifi.description: Select a SpotifyDJ device in setup mode and write WiFi credentials over BLE. No Spotify, MQTT or other secrets are sent over BLE.

data_description.ble_address: Bluetooth address of the SpotifyDJ setup device.
data_description.wifi_ssid: WiFi network name to save on the SpotifyDJ device.
data_description.wifi_password: WiFi password. This is sent only to the BLE WiFi characteristic and is not logged.

spotify.title: Connect Spotify
spotify.description: Enter the HTTPS Home Assistant external URL. SpotifyDJ uses a bundled Spotify Client ID by default; you can override it in advanced options. PKCE does not require a client secret. The Spotify redirect URI must be the external URL plus /api/spotify_dj/spotify/callback.

data_description.spotify_client_id: Advanced override for the bundled Spotify Client ID.
data_description.ha_external_url: Reachable HTTPS URL, preferably your Nabu Casa URL.
data_description.spotify_market: Spotify market used for search and playback requests.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.

spotify_oauth.title: Authorize SpotifyDJ with Spotify
spotify_oauth.description: Home Assistant opens Spotify in your browser. After approving access, return here to continue setup.

data_description.assist_pipeline_id: Assist pipeline used by SpotifyDJ devices for speech recognition.
data_description.tts_engine: Home Assistant TTS entity used for DJ responses.
data_description.tts_language: Language passed to the TTS engine.
data_description.tts_voice: Voice passed to the TTS engine when supported.
data_description.dj_response_enabled: Create a temporary WAV or MP3 audio URL and send it with the DJ text to the SpotifyDJ device.
data_description.spotify_player: Required media player used for Spotify playback.
data_description.spotify_source: Advanced optional override for a Spotify Connect source. Leave empty for dynamic/default playback.
data_description.mqtt_host: Advanced optional MQTT broker host provisioned to the SpotifyDJ device. Defaults to homeassistant.local.
data_description.mqtt_username: Optional MQTT username provisioned to the SpotifyDJ device.
data_description.mqtt_password: Optional MQTT password provisioned to the SpotifyDJ device. It is redacted from diagnostics.
data_description.liked_proxy_playlist_uri: Optional playlist URI used as a proxy for liked songs.
data_description.max_audio_bytes: Compatibility limit for legacy audio uploads.
data_description.allow_ota_on_battery: Allow firmware updates while the device is not USB powered.
data_description.min_battery_for_ota: Minimum battery percentage before OTA is allowed.
data_description.dj_response_ttl_seconds: Number of seconds the temporary WAV download URL remains valid.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.

error.missing_pair_code: Enter the pairing code shown on the SpotifyDJ device display.
error.invalid_pair_code: Enter either a 6 digit pairing code or a 12 character hexadecimal device suffix.
error.spotify_client_id_required: Enter the Client ID from your Spotify Developer App.
error.external_url_required: Enter your Home Assistant external URL, for example your Nabu Casa URL.
error.external_url_https_required: Use an HTTPS external URL. The recommended URL is your Nabu Casa URL.
error.external_url_invalid: Enter a complete HTTPS URL, for example https://example.ui.nabu.casa.
error.oauth_setup_failed: Spotify authorization could not be started. Check the Client ID and external URL, then try again.
error.oauth_not_completed: Spotify authorization has not completed yet. Approve access in Spotify and return to Home Assistant.
error.oauth_failed: Spotify authorization failed. Start the Spotify step again and check the redirect URI in your Spotify app.
error.spotify_player_required: Select the Spotify media player SpotifyDJ should use for playback.
error.ble_device_required: Select a SpotifyDJ BLE device or enter its Bluetooth address.
error.wifi_ssid_required: Enter the WiFi SSID to provision.
error.ble_wifi_failed: WiFi provisioning over Bluetooth failed. Check the selected device, SSID and password, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This SpotifyDJ device is already configured.

init.title: SpotifyDJ options
init.description: Adjust SpotifyDJ voice, playback, OTA and firmware settings. Spotify is a trademark of Spotify AB. SpotifyDJ is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Spotify AB.

data_description.assist_pipeline_id: Assist pipeline used by SpotifyDJ devices for speech recognition.
data_description.spotify_player: Required media player used for Spotify playback.
data_description.dj_response_enabled: Create a temporary WAV or MP3 audio URL and send it with the DJ text to the SpotifyDJ device.
data_description.dj_response_ttl_seconds: Number of seconds the temporary WAV download URL remains valid.
data_description.allow_ota_on_battery: Allow firmware updates while the device is not USB powered.
data_description.show_advanced_options: Show manual and firmware/OTA override fields.

missing_spotify_oauth_scopes.title: Spotify authorization is missing playlist scope
missing_spotify_oauth_scopes.description: SpotifyDJ now requires the Spotify OAuth scope playlist-read-private so the device can find private SpotifyDJ Liked Proxy playlists via /me/playlists. Start Spotify OAuth again from the SpotifyDJ developer action or re-add the integration, then run spotify_dj.provision_spotify_credentials.
